KIRA — your fighter◇ 0 staked
Each pump stakes 1000 ◇ on KIRA. More staked = bigger slice of the pot if she's right. Pumping never changes her odds — she still has to call it correctly. That's the whole game.

Commit to enter the arena
Stake 100,000 ◇ $SOAG in one transaction. Then smash freely — every pump draws from your committed stack instantly, no signing, no waiting.
Non-custodial in the real thing: your $SOAG sits in on-chain escrow you can withdraw anytime. Nobody holds your keys. (demo: no wallet, mock funds)
